entry.title: Remote Server Envoriment For ML Project

link.title: Remote Server Envoriment For ML Project

entry.content:
Remote Development using SSH

The Visual Studio Code Remote - SSH extention allows us to open a remote folder on any remote machine, virtual machine. The work flow is shown below,

Connect romte server with vscode

Follow the official tutorial, we are fine to connect remote server with vscode.

Configuring key based authentication

Typing password each time we connect to remote server is no doubt annoying. Here, set uo SSH key based authentication for your remote host can be useful. To avoid redundencym, follow this tutorial.

Install Anaconda

Conda is an open-source package and environment management system. To install conda we first have Anaconda Installers downloaded at our local machine and then uploaded by drag the file to remote server.

follow tutorial.

Useful conda command

conda info --envs - list of all your envs

conda create --name <env_name> - create env with name

Pytorch & Cuda

here

Git clone project

git clone <repo_link>

entry.title: RNN based channel model with self-attention as interpretation module

link.title: RNN based channel model with self-attention as interpretation module

entry.content:
For those who have seen the Earth from space, and for the hundreds and perhaps thousands more who will, the experience most certainly changes your perspective. The things that we share in our world are far more valuable than those which divide us.

RNN(GRU) Architecture

In our reseach project, \(x^{<t>}\) stands for the i-th bit in block. For each bit at position \(t\) , the activation

\(a^{<t>}\) updated as \(a^{\langle t\rangle}=g_1\left(W_{a a} a^{<t-1\rangle}+W_{a x} x^{<t\rangle}+b_a\right)\) and \(y^{<t>}\) updated as \(y^{<t>}=g_2\left(W_{y a} a^{<t>}+b_y\right)\) , where \(W_{a x}, W_{a a}, W_{y a}, b_a, b_y\) are coefficients shared temporally.

Loss funciton of RNN

\[\mathcal{L}(\widehat{y}, y)=\sum_{t=1}^{T_y} \mathcal{L}\left(\widehat{y}^{<t>}, y^{<t>}\right)\]

Backpropagation through time

\[\frac{\partial \mathcal{L}^{(T)}}{\partial W}=\left.\sum_{t=1}^T \frac{\partial \mathcal{L}^{(T)}}{\partial W}\right|_{(t)}\]

Backpropagation is done at each point in time. At timestep $T$, the derivative of the loss $\mathcal{L}$ with respect to weight matrix $W$ is expressed as above.

Bidirectional RNN

Self-attention RNN

Self-attention was proposed by researchers at Google Research and Google Brain. It was proposed due to challenges faced by encoder-decoder dealing with long sequences.
entry.summary: For those who have seen the Earth from space, and for the hundreds and perhaps thousands more who will, the experience most certainly changes your perspective. The things that we share in our world are far more valuable than those which divide us.
